About this item

  • 【Stylish Heart-Shaped Cut】 This KORURACLUB women's black lingerie features a stunning heart-shaped cutout at the chest, adding a fashionable and edgy flair to your collection of sexy lingerie for women. Perfect for making a statement on date night!
  • 【Versatile Backless Bodysuit】This backless bodysuit is an essential piece for your wardrobe, suitable for various occasions. It can be worn as sexy sleepwear for women or layered under outfits, making it an ideal choice for date outfits and sexy summer outfits for women.
  • 【Comfortable Premium Fabric】Crafted from ultra-stretchy, breathable fabric, this corset lingerie not only flatters your figure but also offers exceptional comfort. You'll love how soft it feels against your skin, making it perfect for all-day wear or special evenings.
  • 【Perfect for Any Occasion】Whether you're looking for plus size sexy lingerie or a chic top for a night out, this bodysuit serves multiple purposes. It's great for anniversaries, pool parties, and can easily transition from day to night, ensuring you look fabulous no matter where you go.
  • 【Size Guide and Support】Please refer to our detailed size chart to select the perfect fit for your body type. If you have any questions after your purchase, our customer support team is here to assist you with any inquiries regarding your sexy lingerie sets for women.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

Customers say

Customers find the bodysuit's material soft and nice, and appreciate its quality. The fit receives mixed feedback, with some saying it's perfect while others note it's not as tight as expected. The sizing also gets mixed reviews, with several customers mentioning it looks small.
